universe.selectionMethod: Apply a CMC regime gate first, then scan live Four.Meme meme-api feeds and reuse the distilled 4alpha discovery buckets (Safe 2 Ape, Medium Risk, Gem Hunt) to shortlist contract-level candidates.

regime.label: risk-off-wait-for-confirmation
regime.summary: The regime gate is defensive, so the strategy specification is valid but should remain inactive until market conditions improve.

entryRules.description: Only scan Four.Meme candidates when total crypto market cap is flat-to-up versus the prior 24h snapshot.
Only activate the strategy when CMC Fear and Greed is above the defensive floor.
Require BNB to hold non-negative 24h momentum before taking Four.Meme continuation setups.
Require BNB to maintain at least modest 7d strength to justify BNB-native meme rotation exposure.
Avoid fresh meme exposure when BTC dominance is accelerating too hard against alt rotation.
Only allow candidates that land in the approved Four.Meme discovery buckets for the current market regime.
entryRules.notes: Selective mode keeps Medium Risk and Gem Hunt as watchlist-only until the broader market improves.

entryRules.description: Match the allowed launch stage to the selected discovery buckets.
Ignore listings that are too new for spread and identity noise to settle.
Focus on the first day of activity so the setup remains a launch-phase strategy rather than a general momentum chase.
Require non-trivial venue activity from the Four.Meme discovery scan before entry.
Require launch-phase candidates to show meaningful bonding progress before entry so the setup is not just the first few minutes of noise.

exitRules.description: Exit the position when drawdown from entry reaches the hard stop threshold.
Lock in strength once the continuation move reaches the defined take-profit target.
Exit if the trade has not resolved within one day of launch-phase momentum.
Flatten open exposure if the market regime gate flips risk-off after entry.

riskControls.description: Cap each position at 0.5% of strategy equity.
Cap concurrent Four.Meme exposure at 1.5% of strategy equity.
Stop taking fresh entries after 1.0% daily strategy drawdown.
Skip candidates that do not survive the live Four.Meme discovery bucket scan, even if the broader market regime is supportive.
Wait two hours after a stop-out before re-entering any Four.Meme candidate.

invalidation.description: Invalidate the setup if Fear and Greed drops back below the strategy floor.
Invalidate the setup if total crypto market cap turns negative again on a 24h basis.
Invalidate the setup if BNB loses its 7d strength bias.

assumptions.description: CMC market metrics are treated as the authoritative snapshot for regime gating at hourly granularity.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should sample the same hourly snapshot cadence rather than tick-level data.

assumptions.description: Four.Meme candidates are evaluated by chain and contract address, not by symbol alone.
assumptions.impact: Backtests must join venue data on contract identity to avoid ticker collisions.

assumptions.description: The liquidity floor is intended to keep slippage assumptions within a small-cap but still testable range.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should model slippage and fees explicitly instead of assuming perfect fills.

assumptions.description: The repo now uses live Four.Meme meme-api discovery feeds and a compact subset of the 4alpha bucket logic, but it does not yet port GMGN or OnchainOS enrichments.
assumptions.impact: Current outputs reflect real venue candidates and bucketed heuristics, while deeper holder-concentration and smart-money filters remain a later slice.

assumptions.description: The strategy spec is reviewed by a distilled 4alpha global learning policy before validation.
assumptions.impact: Backtests should treat the brain review verdict as an activation gate, not as an execution instruction.

assumptions.description: The Four.Meme skill applies a smart-wallet entry doctrine distilled from 4alpha custom skill research as an advisory review policy.
assumptions.impact: Backtests may use currently available market-cap, volume, holder, bonding, and bucket fields immediately; smart-wallet cluster and short-window buy/sell flow should remain explicit future evidence until adapters provide them.

evidence.summary: Total crypto market cap is 2230000000000 USD with a 24h change of -2.10%. BTC dominance is 58.34% with a 24h change of -0.20%.
Fear and Greed is 23 and classified as Fear.
BNB trades at 607.75 USD with -1.03% 24h change and 3.15% 7d change.

Scanned Four.Meme feeds via meme-api with counts new=50, volume=50, hot=50, dex=100. Bucket counts are safe2ape=2, mediumRisk=62, gemHunt=5. Leading names: MAX (0x30c03f3ef3bf39db282e6e80474754ea8df441a4) bucket safe2ape, feeds volumeLeaders+hot, MC $13.44K, Vol $55.72K; Aster合规 (0xc7bd4091fc0997744dca52a7ef4d0e600cb0ffff) bucket safe2ape, feeds hot, MC $12.84K, Vol $9.93K; 不吃压力 (0x89da89494878472ba8cfd509b524688675f84444) bucket mediumRisk, feeds volumeLeaders+hot, MC $5.03K, Vol $95.01K.
Applied 14 learned lesson(s) through multi-agent review.
Applied advisory setup modes, smart-wallet confirmation requirements, 5-of-8 entry checklist, and avoid rules as strategy-spec review policy.

strategyThesis: Do not activate fresh Four.Meme exposure until the CMC regime gate improves. BNB 7d strength is 3.15%, Fear and Greed is 23, and the latest venue buckets are safe2ape=2, mediumRisk=62, gemHunt=5. The multi-agent brain keeps this strategy inactive for now: Gatekeeper kept the strategy inactive because the deterministic regime gate rejected it. Smart-wallet doctrine requirements remain explicit so the setup can be backtested or rejected without inventing missing wallet-flow data.

brainReview.strategyThesis: Do not activate fresh Four.Meme exposure until the CMC regime gate improves. BNB 7d strength is 3.15%, Fear and Greed is 23, and the latest venue buckets are safe2ape=2, mediumRisk=62, gemHunt=5. The multi-agent brain keeps this strategy inactive for now: Gatekeeper kept the strategy inactive because the deterministic regime gate rejected it. Smart-wallet doctrine requirements remain explicit so the setup can be backtested or rejected without inventing missing wallet-flow data.

learning.summary: Never approve a meme-token setup by symbol alone. Contract address, venue, chain, and timestamp must be preserved. Recent clusters of failed entries should create a temporary cooldown instead of repeated re-entry. Medium Risk discovery names are useful watchlist material, but they should not become active entries without a supportive regime and confirmation. Missing social/KOL data is neutral, not bearish. Explicit bearish social evidence, wash-trading evidence, or suspicious fresh-wallet behavior should block. Smart-wallet doctrine applied 10 advisory rule(s): smart-wallet:contract-address-grouping, smart-wallet:hard-gates-override-doctrine, smart-wallet:avoid-dead-liquidity, smart-wallet:confirmation-levels, smart-wallet:missing-wallet-flow-is-future-evidence, smart-wallet:setup-mode:low-mc-revival, smart-wallet:setup-mode:pre-open-near-open-scalp, smart-wallet:setup-mode:confirmed-momentum, smart-wallet:setup-mode:mature-narrative, smart-wallet:entry-checklist-5-of-8.

agents.summary: Safety approved the spec for downstream review with strict size, invalidation controls, and smart-wallet doctrine evidence boundaries.
reasons: Contract-level identity is present for sampled candidates.
The strategy includes explicit stop, exposure, cooldown, and invalidation controls.
The CMC regime gate remains visible before venue selection.
Smart-wallet doctrine is advisory only and cannot bypass hard safety gates.

agents.summary: Social review approved using Four.Meme feed presence as a weak venue-attention proxy while preserving smart-wallet cluster requirements as future evidence.
reasons: 10 selected candidate(s) appeared in hot, volume, or DEX-migrated feeds.
No external KOL or wallet-social feed is claimed in this repo slice.
Missing social data is treated as neutral according to the global learning policy.
Smart-wallet cluster confirmation is required as future evidence before converting watchlist names into active entries.

agents.summary: Gatekeeper kept the strategy inactive because the deterministic regime gate rejected it.
reasons: The backtestable spec is still emitted, but live activation should wait.

rationale: CMC conditions do not justify activating fresh Four.Meme launch-phase exposure yet. The current CMC snapshot shows Fear and Greed at 23, total market cap change at -2.10% over 24h, and BNB at 3.15% over 7d. The venue scan is no longer hypothetical: the current Four.Meme discovery snapshot produced 10 featured candidates across Safe 2 Ape (2), Medium Risk (62), and Gem Hunt (5), with MAX (safe2ape), Aster合规 (safe2ape), 不吃压力 (mediumRisk) as the leading names. Brain review: Gatekeeper kept the strategy inactive because the deterministic regime gate rejected it.

rejectionReasons.description: Total crypto market cap is -2.10% over 24h, below the flat-to-up entry gate.
CMC Fear and Greed is 23, below the minimum activation threshold of 35.
BNB 24h performance is -1.03%, below the non-negative momentum gate.
Brain review returned wait: Gatekeeper kept the strategy inactive because the deterministic regime gate rejected it.
